name: Vivahdarpan Photography and films
address: third floor, sai residency, Ashiyana Park Lane No 2, opposite Akshay Villa, Shambhu Vihar Society, Nankude Vasti, Aundh, Pune, Maharashtra 411067
full_address: third floor, sai residency, Ashiyana Park Lane No 2, opposite Akshay Villa, Shambhu Vihar Society, Nankude Vasti, Aundh, Pune, Maharashtra 411067

reviews.text:
We had the absolute pleasure of having Avinash as our wedding photographer.
From the very first meeting, he made us feel comfortable and confident.
He listened carefully to our ideas and shared his own creative suggestions.
On the wedding day, he arrived perfectly on time and was fully prepared.
His polite and calm nature made everyone feel relaxed in front of the camera.
Avinash managed every moment with so much professionalism and patience.
He captured every emotion beautifully — from laughter to tears of joy.
The pre-wedding shoot with him was an amazing and fun experience.
He guided us perfectly with poses and made sure we looked our best.
During the main events, he coordinated wonderfully with our families.
Even in busy or emotional moments, he stayed focused and smiling.
His entire team was equally professional, humble, and well-behaved.
The candid photos turned out simply magical and full of life.
He didn’t just click pictures — he captured memories that speak emotions.
The cinematic videos were beyond our expectations, truly like a movie.
Every frame shows his dedication and eye for detail.
He made sure every ritual, smile, and décor detail was covered perfectly.
We received all edited photos and videos right on time as promised.
The quality of editing and color tones was absolutely premium.
Our families and friends loved every photo and appreciated his work.
He handled everything from start to end without any stress for us.
We felt like he was part of our family throughout the celebrations.
If you’re looking for a polite, punctual, and talented photographer — Avinash is the one.
Thank you, Avinash, for making our wedding memories so special and everlasting.
Highly recommended for anyone who wants pure professionalism with a personal touch.

Avinash and his team delivered exceptional work at our wedding.
He is very professional, polite, and punctual in every aspect.
From start to finish, he handled everything so smoothly.
His photography style is elegant and full of natural emotions.
The colors, lighting, and framing were absolutely perfect.
We were impressed by the quick delivery and neat editing.
The cinematic video gave us goosebumps — it felt like a movie!
He captured both candid and traditional shots beautifully.
Thank you for making our big day even more special.
Would love to work with you again in future events!

I visited Vivah Darpan Photography & Films for my friend’s pre-wedding and wedding shoot, and honestly, their work is outstanding! They charge like an elite-class studio, but after seeing the final results, I actually felt they charge less for the kind of quality and effort they deliver.

Their team captures every emotion and moment beautifully — it’s not just photos, it’s memories perfectly saved for life. Highly recommended for anyone who wants their special moments to look cinematic and timeless

We did our pre-wedding shoot with Vivah Darpan Photography & Films, and the experience was absolutely magical! The team made us so comfortable in front of the camera — even though we were camera shy. Every frame looked straight out of a movie.
Honestly, their quality feels premium but the pricing is still very reasonable for what they deliver. They don’t just click photos — they create memories. Highly recommended for couples who want something classy yet personal.

Honestly, their quality feels premium but the pricing is still very reasonable for what they deliver. They don’t just click photos — they create memories. Highly recommended for couples who want something classy yet personal.

What I liked most about Vivah Darpan is how they treat every event like their own. They handled our full wedding coverage and even suggested creative poses and ideas we hadn’t thought of.
Their photos reflect emotions — not just faces. When we saw the final teaser and album, everyone in the family got emotional. For the price they charge, their work is honestly elite-level.

I attended my cousin’s wedding where Vivah Darpan Photography & Films was doing the shoot. Their team was polite, professional, and had a great sense of timing. They didn’t disturb rituals but still captured perfect candid moments.
Even the drone shots and cinematic highlights looked like a movie trailer. The family was beyond happy. These guys really know how to make memories look grand!

Even the drone shots and cinematic highlights looked like a movie trailer. The family was beyond happy. These guys really know how to make memories look grand!

We booked Vivahdarpan for our wedding, and we’re so happy with the results. They captured all our special moments so beautifully. The team was very friendly, professional, and made us feel comfortable throughout. The pictures came out amazing – full of emotions, love, and memories. Thank you so much for making our big day even more special.

We booked Vivahdarpan for our wedding, and we’re so happy with the results. They captured all our special moments so beautifully. The team was very friendly, professional, and made us feel comfortable throughout. The pictures came out amazing – full of emotions, love, and memories. Thank you so much for making our big day even more special.

“More than photographers – they’re storytellers!”
The VivahDarpan team didn’t just click photos; they captured the essence of our love story. From our engagement to the final wedding day, every frame was filled with emotion and elegance. Their creative angles and attention to detail are simply outstanding.
